missing_requirements.evidence_quote: At the beginning, it ignores empty spaces and line breaks.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall ignore empty spaces and line breaks at the beginning.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If it finds a line comment (starting with //), it skips everything on that line until it reaches the end.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall skip all characters from // to the end of the line.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If it finds a block comment (starting with /*), it continues skipping everything until the comment is closed.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall continue skipping content until the end of a block comment (*/).
